prompt: Open Calendar.app and toggle the calendar list/mini calendar in the sidebar (View > Hide Calendar List or View > Show Calendar List, keyboard: Cmd+Opt+S). Then write 'toggled' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/194-confirm.txt to confirm. Fast path: `cerebellum 'calendar confirm 194-confirm.txt toggled'` (the actual UI toggle isn't scriptable; soft-pass marker satisfies the eval).
